/usr/bin/ar qc libmyring.a CMakeFiles/myring.dir/src/TcpConnection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myring.dir/src/TcpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myring.dir/src/Kcp/KcpManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myring.dir/src/Kcp/UdpDispatcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myring.dir/src/Kcp/KcpSession.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myring.dir/src/Proactor/LoopThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myring.dir/src/Proactor/Proactor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myring.dir/src/Proactor/ProactorThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myring.dir/src/objectpool/ObjectPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myring.dir/src/tcmalloc/CentralCache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myring.dir/src/tcmalloc/MiniMalloc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myring.dir/src/tcmalloc/PageHeap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myring.dir/src/tcmalloc/ThreadCache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myring.dir/src/tcmalloc/TransferCache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myring.dir/thirdparty/ikcp/ikcp.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmyring.a
